'''âp-y-y''' ('''kapayay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maim|maim]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-y-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maim|maim]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-y-y
|-
! Lemma
| kapayay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipayay|thipayay]] || [[word:jipayay|jipayay]] || [[word:shipayay|shipayay]] || [[word:kipayay|kipayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupayay|thuthupayay]] || [[word:jujupayay|jujupayay]] || [[word:shushupayay|shushupayay]] || [[word:kukupayay|kukupayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupayay|thupayay]] || [[word:jupayay|jupayay]] || [[word:shupayay|shupayay]] || [[word:kupayay|kupayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupayay|thupayay]] || [[word:jupayay|jupayay]] || [[word:shupayay|shupayay]] || [[word:kupayay|kupayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepayay|thepayay]] || [[word:jepayay|jepayay]] || [[word:shepayay|shepayay]] || [[word:kepayay|kepayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopayay|thothopayay]] || [[word:jojopayay|jojopayay]] || [[word:shoshopayay|shoshopayay]] || [[word:kokopayay|kokopayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopayay|thopayay]] || [[word:jopayay|jopayay]] || [[word:shopayay|shopayay]] || [[word:kopayay|kopayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopayay|thopayay]] || [[word:jopayay|jopayay]] || [[word:shopayay|shopayay]] || [[word:kopayay|kopayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpayay|thĂŠpayay]] || [[word:jĂŠpayay|jĂŠpayay]] || [[word:shĂŠpayay|shĂŠpayay]] || [[word:kĂŠpayay|kĂŠpayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapayay|thathapayay]] || [[word:jajapayay|jajapayay]] || [[word:shashapayay|shashapayay]] || [[word:kakapayay|kakapayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapayay|thapayay]] || [[word:japayay|japayay]] || [[word:shapayay|shapayay]] || [[word:kapayay|kapayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapayay|thapayay]] || [[word:japayay|japayay]] || [[word:shapayay|shapayay]] || [[word:kapayay|kapayay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapayay|shapayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapayay|goshapayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapayay|gokishapayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapayaynĂŒ|shapayaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapayaynknĂŒ|goshapayaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapayaynĂŒ|gokishapayaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapayayshĂ«|shapayayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapayaynkshĂ«|goshapayaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapayayshĂ«|gokishapayayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapayayro|shapayayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapayaynkro|goshapayaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapayayro|gokishapayayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapayaymu|shapayaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapayaynkmu|goshapayaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapayaymu|gokishapayaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapayaysher|shapayaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapayaynksher|goshapayaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapayaysher|gokishapayaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapayayng|shapayayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapayaynkng|goshapayaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapayayng|gokishapayayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapayaya|shapayaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapayaynkya|goshapayaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapayaya|gokishapayaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapayayam|shapayayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapayaynkyam|goshapayaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapayayam|gokishapayayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapayaynĂŒshĂ«|shapayaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapayaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshapayaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapayaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishapayaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapayaynĂŒro|shapayaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapayaynknĂŒro|goshapayaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapayaynĂŒro|gokishapayaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapayaynĂŒmu|shapayaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapayaynknĂŒmu|goshapayaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapayaynĂŒmu|gokishapayaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapayayshĂ«nĂŒ|shapayayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapayaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapayaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapayayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapayayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapayayshĂ«ro|shapayayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapayaynkshĂ«ro|goshapayaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapayayshĂ«ro|gokishapayayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapayayshĂ«mu|shapayayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapayaynkshĂ«mu|goshapayaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapayayshĂ«mu|gokishapayayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapayayronĂŒ|shapayayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapayaynkronĂŒ|goshapayaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapayayronĂŒ|gokishapayayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapayayroshĂ«|shapayayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapayaynkroshĂ«|goshapayaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapayayroshĂ«|gokishapayayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapayayromu|shapayayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapayaynkromu|goshapayaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapayayromu|gokishapayayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapayaymunĂŒ|shapayaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapayaynkmunĂŒ|goshapayaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapayaymunĂŒ|gokishapayaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapayaymushĂ«|shapayaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapayaynkmushĂ«|goshapayaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapayaymushĂ«|gokishapayaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapayaymuro|shapayaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapayaynkmuro|goshapayaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapayaymuro|gokishapayaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
